summary: Completed full end-to-end testing of Sovereign Genesis Platform with LLM Mode Selector. All major features working: LLM mode switching (Cloud/Local/Hybrid), Socratic Engine with ambiguity detection, Genesis Pipeline visualization, Quality Gate assessment, Tech Stack catalog, and Build Engine code generation.

minor.issue: Intermittent 520 errors when LLM mode is set to 'local' without Ollama running. Mode resets to 'local' on backend restart.
minor.workaround: Ensure cloud mode is configured after backend restart

issues: ESLint warning: useEffect missing dependency 'fetchStatus' - minor code quality issue

action_items: Consider adding automatic cloud mode fallback when backend restarts and local LLM is unavailable
Fix ESLint warning in LLMSelector.jsx (add fetchStatus to useEffect dependencies)
critical_code_review_comments: LLM mode persistence: Mode resets to default on backend restart - consider persisting to database
HybridLLMProvider correctly handles fallback from local to cloud when local unavailable
All endpoints properly return llm_info metadata as specified
Frontend properly displays all 3 LLM modes with visual indicators
Clarification panel correctly shows ambiguities sorted by priority
seed_data_creation: None - tests use dynamic session creation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full SGP platform tested. LLM Mode Selector working with Cloud/Local/Hybrid modes. Local LLM (Ollama) is NOT installed so local_available=false is expected. Hybrid mode correctly falls back to cloud. All Socratic Engine, Genesis Pipeline, Quality Gate, Tech Stack, and Build Engine endpoints verified. Frontend displays ambiguity nodes, clarification panel, and confidence scores correctly.

LLM Mode Selector.toggle_button: WORKING - Shows current mode (Cloud/Local/Hybrid) with icon
LLM Mode Selector.mode_switching: WORKING - Updates UI and calls backend API
LLM Mode Selector.local_warning: WORKING - Shows 'Not Running' when Ollama unavailable
